# Stage 2 — CSS Migration Map (Wave 3 pre-flight artifact)

**Status**: COMPLETE (produced by Wave 3 agent, 2026-04-14)
**Purpose**: Enumerate every load-bearing global selector in `inspector/frontend/src/styles/*.css` that depends on DOM structure generated by JS imperative code OR that sets `:root` CSS variables consumed elsewhere. For each, assign to the wave that rewrites it.

---

## Legend

- **Selector / Pattern** — the global CSS selector or `:root` variable declaration
- **File:Line** — location in `src/styles/`
- **What it depends on** — how JS produces/manages the trigger (class toggle, attribute set, CSS var assignment)
- **Wave that rewrites trigger** — when the trigger migrates to Svelte; the selector moves to scoped `<style>` in the same wave
- **Svelte equivalent** — the Svelte idiom that replaces the JS-managed trigger

---

## 1. `:root` CSS custom properties set by JS at runtime

These are declared with fallback values in `base.css` `:root { }` but overwritten by JS via `document.documentElement.style.setProperty(...)` after fetching config from the server. They must remain as global CSS variables until their consumer component converts to a Svelte `style:` binding or scoped variable.

| Selector / Pattern | File:Line | What it depends on | Wave that rewrites trigger | Svelte equivalent |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `--unified-display-max-height` (fallback `800px`) | `styles/base.css:13` | `timestamps/index.ts:114` sets via `root.setProperty` after `/api/ts/config` fetch | Wave 4 (Timestamps tab) | `style="max-height: {cfg.unified_display_max_height}px"` on `UnifiedDisplay.svelte` |
| `--anim-highlight-color` (fallback `#f0a500`) | `styles/base.css:14` | `timestamps/index.ts:115` sets after config fetch | Wave 4 (Timestamps tab) | `style="--anim-highlight-color: {cfg.anim_highlight_color}"` on `TimestampsTab.svelte` or scoped `<style>` with CSS var binding |
| `--anim-word-transition` (fallback `opacity 0.15s ease`) | `styles/base.css:15` | `timestamps/index.ts:119` sets after config fetch | Wave 4 (Timestamps tab) | Svelte computed string: `style="--anim-word-transition: opacity {wordDur} {easing}"` |
| `--anim-char-transition` (fallback `opacity 0.15s ease`) | `styles/base.css:16` | `timestamps/index.ts:120` sets after config fetch | Wave 4 (Timestamps tab) | Svelte computed string as above |
| `--anim-word-spacing` (no fallback in CSS; set-only) | JS-only, no CSS fallback | `timestamps/index.ts:121` | Wave 4 (Timestamps tab) | `style:--anim-word-spacing={cfg.anim_word_spacing}` on animation wrapper |
| `--anim-line-height` (no fallback in CSS; set-only) | JS-only | `timestamps/index.ts:122` | Wave 4 (Timestamps tab) | `style:--anim-line-height={cfg.anim_line_height}` |
| `--anim-font-size` (no fallback in CSS; set-only) | JS-only | `timestamps/index.ts:123` | Wave 4 (Timestamps tab) | `style:--anim-font-size={cfg.anim_font_size}` |
| `--analysis-word-font-size` (no fallback in CSS; set-only) | JS-only | `timestamps/index.ts:124` | Wave 4 (Timestamps tab) | `style:--analysis-word-font-size={cfg.analysis_word_font_size}` on `UnifiedDisplay.svelte` |
| `--analysis-letter-font-size` (no fallback in CSS; set-only) | JS-only | `timestamps/index.ts:125` | Wave 4 (Timestamps tab) | `style:--analysis-letter-font-size={cfg.analysis_letter_font_size}` |
| `--seg-font-size` (consumed in `segments.css:275`) | `styles/segments.css:275` | `segments/index.ts:181` sets after `/api/seg/config` fetch | Wave 5 (Segments shell) | `style:--seg-font-size={cfg.seg_font_size}` on `SegmentsTab.svelte` |
| `--seg-word-spacing` (consumed in `segments.css:276`) | `styles/segments.css:276` | `segments/index.ts:182` sets after `/api/seg/config` fetch | Wave 5 (Segments shell) | `style:--seg-word-spacing={cfg.seg_word_spacing}` on `SegmentsTab.svelte` |

**Baseline note**: `--mega-line-gap` (8px), `--word-phoneme-gap` (4px), `--phoneme-box-gap` (2px) declared in `base.css:10-12` are STATIC — never overwritten by JS. They stay in `base.css` as-is through all waves.

---

## 2. Class-toggled selectors driven by JS imperative code

### 2a. Edit mode overlay (formerly `body.seg-edit-active`, rewritten in Stage 1)

The `body.seg-edit-active` rule was already removed during Stage 1 cleanup. The current implementation uses a fixed-position overlay element with `.seg-edit-overlay` class (inserted/removed from the DOM by `segments/edit/common.ts`). The `z-index` stacking is:

- `.seg-edit-overlay` at z-index 10 (`segments.css:326-332`)
- `.seg-row.seg-edit-target` at z-index 11 (`segments.css:334-338`)

| Selector / Pattern | File:Line | What it depends on | Wave that rewrites trigger | Svelte equivalent |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `.seg-edit-overlay` (fixed overlay div) | `styles/segments.css:326` | `segments/edit/common.ts:26` — `_editOverlay.className = 'seg-edit-overlay'`, appended to `document.body` on edit entry, removed on exit | Wave 7 (Edit modes) | `<EditOverlay>` component rendered conditionally via `{#if $editStore.active}`, scoped `<style>` owns the fixed-position rule |
| `.seg-row.seg-edit-target` (z-index elevation) | `styles/segments.css:334-338`, `:399-407` | `segments/edit/split.ts:34` and `segments/edit/trim.ts:26` add `.seg-edit-target` class to the row element | Wave 7 (Edit modes) | `class:seg-edit-target={isEditTarget}` prop on `SegmentRow.svelte`; rule moves to scoped `<style>` |
| `.seg-row.seg-edit-target canvas` (canvas pointer-events) | `styles/segments.css:404` | Same trigger as above (same row gets the class) | Wave 7 (Edit modes) | Absorbed into `SegmentRow.svelte` scoped style |

### 2b. Animation display (timestamps reveal-mode)

| Selector / Pattern | File:Line | What it depends on | Wave that rewrites trigger | Svelte equivalent |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `#animation-display.anim-window .anim-word` (opacity=0 base) | `styles/timestamps.css:269` | `#animation-display` ID is static HTML; `.anim-window` class is the CSS name of the element (`id="animation-display" class="anim-window"`). The `hidden` attribute toggles visibility via `[hidden] { display: none }`. The `.anim-chars` subclass is added/removed by `timestamps/animation.ts` | Wave 4 (Timestamps tab) | `<AnimationDisplay>` scoped style; `class:anim-chars={granularity === 'chars'}` drives the mode |
| `#animation-display.anim-window .anim-word.active` / `.reached` | `styles/timestamps.css:270-271` | `timestamps/animation.ts` adds/removes `.active` and `.reached` classes on individual word elements | Wave 4 (Timestamps tab) | `class:active={word.active}` + `class:reached={word.reached}` on word elements inside `AnimationDisplay.svelte` |
| `#animation-display.anim-window.anim-chars .anim-word` | `styles/timestamps.css:274` | Mode toggled by keyboard (`timestamps/animation.ts`) via `classList.toggle('anim-chars')` on the container | Wave 4 (Timestamps tab) | `class:anim-chars={granularity === 'chars'}` on container div |
| `#animation-display.anim-window.anim-chars .anim-char` (opacity, transitions) | `styles/timestamps.css:275-277` | Same `anim-chars` class toggle | Wave 4 (Timestamps tab) | Scoped in `AnimationDisplay.svelte` |

### 2c. Segment neighbour highlight

| Selector / Pattern | File:Line | What it depends on | Wave that rewrites trigger | Svelte equivalent |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `.seg-row.seg-neighbour` | `styles/segments.css:422` | `segments/rendering.ts:240` — `row.classList.add('seg-neighbour')` when `seg._isNeighbour` is true (transient property set during edit mode) | Wave 5 (Segments rendering) | `class:seg-neighbour={seg._isNeighbour}` prop on `SegmentRow.svelte` |

---

## 3. Attribute-selector driven by JS (IntersectionObserver)

| Selector / Pattern | File:Line | What it depends on | Wave that rewrites trigger | Svelte equivalent |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `canvas[data-needs-waveform]` | No CSS rule (attribute used as query selector only) | `segments/rendering.ts:83` sets `canvas.setAttribute('data-needs-waveform', '')` on each newly created canvas; `segments/waveform/index.ts` uses `querySelectorAll('canvas[data-needs-waveform]')` as the IntersectionObserver target; attribute is REMOVED after first draw | Wave 6 (Segments waveform) | `WaveformCanvas.svelte` uses `onMount` + `IntersectionObserver` internally; the `data-needs-waveform` sentinel becomes an internal implementation detail or is removed entirely |

---

## 4. Static selectors — safe to scope without behavior concern

These selectors are purely presentational and use stable class names with no JS class-toggling. They can be moved into scoped `<style>` blocks of the corresponding Svelte component at any wave without behavioral risk. Listed here for completeness so Wave 11 can verify the `src/styles/` directory is fully emptied.

| CSS File | Scoped into | Target wave |
|---|---|---|
| `styles/base.css` | Stays global — resets, fonts, `:root` static vars, scrollbars, `.tab-btn` | Wave 3 (this wave) establishes; Wave 11 final review |
| `styles/components.css` | `.btn`/`.btn-sm` → `Button.svelte`; `.ss-*` → `SearchableSelect.svelte`; `.audio-controls`, `.info-bar` → tab shell components | Wave 3 (Button + SearchableSelect scoped styles); remaining → Waves 4-11 |
| `styles/timestamps.css` | `TimestampsTab.svelte`, `UnifiedDisplay.svelte`, `AnimationDisplay.svelte`, `TimestampsWaveform.svelte` | Wave 4 |
| `styles/segments.css` | `SegmentsTab.svelte`, `SegmentRow.svelte`, `SegmentsList.svelte`, edit mode components | Waves 5-7 |
| `styles/validation.css` | `ValidationPanel.svelte`, `ErrorCard.svelte` | Wave 8 |
| `styles/history.css` | `HistoryPanel.svelte`, `HistoryBatch.svelte`, `HistoryOp.svelte`, `HistoryArrows.svelte` | Wave 10 |
| `styles/stats.css` | `StatsPanel.svelte`, `StatsChart.svelte`, `ChartFullscreen.svelte` | Wave 8 |
| `styles/filters.css` | `FiltersBar.svelte`, `FilterCondition.svelte` | Wave 5 |
| `styles/audio-tab.css` | `AudioTab.svelte`, `AudioPlayer.svelte` | Wave 11 |

---

## 5. Summary: Wave assignment

| Wave | CSS concerns handled |
|---|---|
| Wave 3 (this) | `Button.svelte` absorbs `.btn`/`.btn-sm` scoped styles; `SearchableSelect.svelte` absorbs `.ss-*` scoped styles. No `:root` vars rewritten yet. |
| Wave 4 | All 9 timestamps CSS vars set by JS → Svelte bindings. All `#animation-display` / `.anim-window` / `.anim-chars` class selectors → `AnimationDisplay.svelte` scoped style. `styles/timestamps.css` fully emptied. |
| Wave 5 | `--seg-font-size` + `--seg-word-spacing` JS setProperty → Svelte bindings. `.seg-row.seg-neighbour` → `class:` directive. `styles/segments.css` partially migrated. `styles/filters.css` fully emptied. |
| Wave 6 | `canvas[data-needs-waveform]` attribute sentinel internalized in `WaveformCanvas.svelte` / `SegmentWaveformCanvas.svelte`. |
| Wave 7 | `.seg-edit-overlay` + `.seg-row.seg-edit-target` z-index stacking → `EditOverlay.svelte` scoped style + `class:` directive on `SegmentRow`. `styles/segments.css` fully emptied. |
| Wave 8 | `styles/validation.css` + `styles/stats.css` fully emptied. |
| Wave 10 | `styles/history.css` fully emptied. |
| Wave 11 | Verify `styles/` contains only `base.css`. Delete all other emptied files. |
